title: The Orphan
description: As rain begins to fall, you notice a young child sitting alone beneath a dead tree. Their clothes are torn, and they clutch an empty satchel. 'Have you seen my parents?' they ask quietly.

options.title: Help the Child
options.description: Stay with the child until you can find someone who can care for them.

options.title: Give Them Some Gold
options.description: You cannot stay, but perhaps a few coins will help them survive.

options.title: Walk Away
options.description: You lower your head and continue down the road, leaving the child behind.
